title: 24 Pairs Palm Coated Safety Work Gloves - Firm Grip Gardening Gloves Non-Slip PU Coated Builders Gloves Lightweight Breathable Protective EN388 Mechanic Working Gloves (XL (10))
features: Conforms to EN388, CAT II Rated 4131x - Abrasion 4, CUT 1, Tear 3, Puncture 1
Excellent grip in dry wet and oily conditions, Fits like a second skin, molding to the operators hand
PU Coated Palm, 13 Gauge Nylon Liner - Very comfortable with high level of flexibility

BREATHABLE: The seamless knitted liner is ergonomically designed to fit snugly but not tightly. Made from breathable polyester that helps reduce heat build-up, ensuring that the gloves remain comfortable even after extended wear.

NON-SLIP: The gloves are coated with a PU layer on the palm and fingertips, which offers firm grip and durability. Whether you're working indoors or outdoors, these work gloves offer comfortable and reliable protection for your hands.

COMFORTABLE: Our workwear gloves are elasticized at the wrist, which is stretchy and comfortable to wear, making the gloves highly dexterous and non-slip. The knitted cuff is not easy to come unstitched, extending the glove's working life.

MULTIPLE USES: Ideal for general light to medium duty work, such as Assembly, Auto Repairing, Gardening, DIY, Warehouse, Construction, Home improvement and so on. With a pack of 24 pairs, these gloves offer exceptional value and long-lasting performance, suitable for both men and women.
description: 24 Pairs Pu Coated Safety Work Gloves Glove For Builders Gardening Constructions Warehouse E.T.C 13 Gauge Seamless knit shell offers Good Comfort, finger Dexterity and Breathability. The strength of these work gloves is significantly better than the regular cotton gloves. With Polyurethane coated palm and fingertips, these safety work gloves provides a secure grip in dry and slightly wet/oily conditions and offers high dexterity and tactile sensitivity. Ideal for general light to medium duty tasks in dry and slightly wet/oily conditions, such as general purpose, DIY, Assembly, Auto Repairing, Warehouse, Construction, Home improvement, Yard, Gardening, Cleaning. ️Recommend washing gloves in tempered water not exceeding 40℃. A mild non-ionic laundry soap or detergent should be used. Wash in a 5-10 minute cycle time. Rinse in cold water. Tumble dry at temperature not exceeding 60℃. Conformity: EN388 CAT II Rated 4131x Specifications: Very comfortable with high level of flexibility Durable Palm coating offers assured grip and long service life Breathable Designed for easy movement and continuous wear Cut & abrasion resistance Excellent resistance to oil and grease Suitable for: Construction • Outdoor General Handling • Plastering • Warehouse
